title: [Nio] TFMG Energy converter
description: Block converter from Create: The Factory Must Grow energy to FE
body:
**TFMG Energy Connector is a utility bridge mod for NeoForge 1.21.1 designed to unite two industrial power systems.**

If you love the complex electrical networks and high-voltage generators of Create: The Factory Must Grow, but want to use that power for your Applied Energistics 2 storage or other tech mods, this is the solution.


🔧 How to use:

- Place the Energy Converter block.
- Attach a TFMG Electric Cable Connector to any side of the block.
- On the other sides of the block, connect your AE2 Energy Acceptor, power cables, or machines.


🛠 Requirements:

    NeoForge 1.21.1

    Create

    Create: The Factory Must Grow (TFMG)
